title: Venn Vultures
short_description: Two overlapping hoops, one label each — drop each thing where it belongs: only the left, only the right, both, or outside in 'neither'.
description: The vultures are sorting their treasures into a Venn diagram, and they need a clear thinker. Read the two labels — 'Red' and 'Round', 'Animal' and 'Can fly', 'Even' and 'Greater than 10' — then decide, for each item, whether it belongs to only the left set, only the right set, both (the overlap), or neither (outside). It teaches classification and set logic: attributes, the meaning of AND / OR / NOT, and how the overlap holds things that are in both groups at once. Grade bands ramp from simple colours and shapes, to living-things categories, to number properties that make you think. Correct placements and streaks earn bonus points. A free online sorting, sets and Venn diagram logic game for kids in grades 1–5, feeding your score and GP on OnlyGrins.
controls: Mouse / tap the region (Only left, Both, Only right, or Neither) for each item.
